author: Mitchell Parton
title: Albertsons’ new ‘micro sitcom’ is a big deal for retail media
description: Albertsons Media Collective has launched its first episodic, scripted branded-entertainment campaign in partnership with Procter & Gamble.
content: Retail media content is becoming more complex, with major brands making big investments in videos made specifically to reach shoppers on screens in grocery stores or while shopping on an app.It came … [+7255 chars]
